title: Marco Belli
text: Home * People * Marco Belli Marco Belli , an Italian computer chess programmer and author of the UCI compliant chess engines Vajolet and Vajolet2 . After early chess programming trials in C# , Marco worked through Stef Luijten's tutorial on Winglet , Writing a Chess Program in 99 Steps [1] , and created his second engine in C++ , already forerunner of Vajolet2 [2] .
